positive: A minimalist, sophisticated celestial map composition featuring abstract glowing constellations and interconnected geometric line work. The main subject is a stylized, ethereal crescent moon nestled among deep indigo and cosmic teal gradients. The style should be highly graphic and elegant, reminiscent of Art Nouveau meets modern sci-fi illustration. Use strong, contrasting silhouettes and glowing neon accents (electric blue, vibrant gold) against a deep, matte background. The composition must be centered and symmetrical, perfectly balanced for apparel printing. Flat vector aesthetic, crisp edges, isolated subject matter, high-contrast depth.
